{{Quote|We of the Elders do not have Force sensitivity ourselves, but by harnessing the genetic structure of other tribes, we hope to be able to breed the gene back into our species|translated=1|Ll'awa, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Ll'awa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] [[Elders (Rakatan)|Elder]] and [[Scientist/Legends|researcher]], attempting to restore [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] to the Rakata [[Species/Legends|species]]. He hoped to achieve this by breeding potential Force-sensitive individuals to re-inherit the ability to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—which they had possessed in times past. He knew that [[The One]] would've have been a candidate considering how he rose to power, however it wouldn't be feasible due to his aggressiveness. Ll'awa needed data on the genetic structure of exceptional individuals in his own species spanning the past millennia. He asked [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to get this data that was located in the [[Temple of the Ancients]]. Revan did so and returned the data to Ll'awa allowing him to advance with his research.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player takes the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] option and kills the Elders, Ll'awa will be killed as well.
